allow: Bash(curl -sS --max-time 10 -I -X OPTIONS -H "Origin: https://tauri.localhost" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: GET" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type, X-Emby-Authorization, X-Emby-Token, X-Tentacle-Language" "https://tentacle.rouge-informatique.ch/api/jellyfin/Users/Public")

Bash(curl -sS --max-time 10 -D - -H "Origin: https://tauri.localhost" -H "X-Emby-Authorization: MediaBrowser Client=""Tentacle"", Device=""Desktop"", DeviceId=""test"", Version=""0.8.1""" "https://tentacle.rouge-informatique.ch/api/jellyfin/Users/Public")

Bash(curl -sS --max-time 10 -w "\\n\\nHTTP STATUS: %{http_code}" -H "Origin: https://tauri.localhost" -H "X-Emby-Authorization: MediaBrowser Client=""Tentacle"", Device=""Desktop"", DeviceId=""test123"", Version=""0.8.1""" "https://tentacle.rouge-informatique.ch/api/jellyfin/Users/Public")

Bash(curl -sS --max-time 10 -w "\\nHTTP STATUS: %{http_code}" -H "Origin: https://tauri.localhost" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Emby-Authorization: MediaBrowser Client=""Tentacle"", Device=""Desktop"", DeviceId=""test123"", Version=""0.8.1""" -X POST -d '{""Username"":""baduser"",""Pw"":""badpass""}' "https://tentacle.rouge-informatique.ch/api/jellyfin/Users/AuthenticateByName")
Bash(node -e "try { const m = require\(''metro/package.json''\); console.log\(''metro:'', m.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''metro not found locally''\); }")
Bash(node -e "try { const m = require\(''@react-native/community-cli-plugin/package.json''\); console.log\(''cli-plugin:'', m.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''cli-plugin not found''\); }")
Bash(node -e "try { const m = require\(''react-native/package.json''\); console.log\(''react-native:'', m.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''rn not found''\); }")
